requested_action: Revise the planning package so ADR-011 supersedes the rejected player-facing map drawing and spatial-index direction instead of polishing the current topology-backed polygon map.
notes: Treat the latest product-owner statement as root-level rejection of both map drawing and spatial indexing.
Do not preserve polygon-first governance footprints as the main player-facing spatial substrate.
ADR-010 can remain as anti-grid proof, but it is insufficient as the content-lock target.
The downstream chain must create a new strategic terrain model, fixture/content plan, renderer-interaction plan, and validation plan.
